STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL – Non-Public – Project Lotus Banyan – Board/Compliance Briefing (Aurora Fibre Public Company Limited, SET ticker AFB)
From: Ms. Waranya Chai, General Counsel, waranya.chai@aurorafibre.co.th; To: Board of Directors; Date: 2026-06-28
Subject: Proposed THB 1,250,000,000 convertible debentures and 19.9% private placement to Meridian Harbor Holdings Ltd. (BVI) with cross-border Facility Agreement
Embargo date/time for external communications: 2026-07-15 09:00 ICT, pending SET/SEC review and notification under the SEA
Definitive agreements targeted for execution: Share Subscription Agreement (SSA), Convertible Debenture Terms, Intercreditor Deed; draft governed by Thai law with Singapore-law security package
MAC/MAE: the SSA carves out general market/FX movements; parties confirm that no Material Adverse Change has occurred since 31 May 2026, and disclosure itself shall not constitute a MAE
Conditions precedent include: EGM approval (not less than 75% of votes), waiver of tender offer requirement under SEC rules if below 25%, and Bank of Thailand consent for offshore inflow
Use of proceeds: refinance THB 600,000,000 short-term bridge and fund Plant 3 expansion; no dividend covenant breach expected (net debt/EBITDA forecast 2.8x post-deal)
PDPA note: limit personal data in the SET filing to director names and positions; redact employee IDs and contact details from appendices
Public-source reference: capacity metrics in our 2568 Form 56-1 One Report and the 2025 SET presentation are already public and may be cited
Investor-relations draft (internal): we anticipate EPS dilution of approximately 6.4% in year one, improving thereafter on volume ramp; do not include pro forma tables before embargo lifts
Compliance risk: trading blackout applies to all insiders from memo circulation; breach may contravene SEA Section 241 on insider trading and Section 246 on disclosure
